tool_args.label: MTA MNR Total Workforce as of June 30, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: As of June 30, 2022 , MTA MNR's workforce consisted of 5,912 employees of which females represented 13% (740) and minorities represented 40% (2,348) of the total workforce.

tool_args.label: Workforce Decrease vs 2Q2021
tool_args.raw_text: MNR's workforce decreased by 258 employees in comparison with the second 2021 (2Q2021) workforce.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MNR's workforce decreased by 258 employees in comparison with the second 2021 (2Q2021) workforce.

tool_args.label: Empowering Women in Transportation Women's History Month Events
tool_args.raw_text: March – Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) joined 100+ employees and MTA colleagues for a series of events celebrating 'Women Providing Healing, Promoting Hope'.

payload.description: Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) joined 100+ employees and MTA colleagues for a series of events celebrating Women's History Month – 'Women Providing Healing, Promoting Hope'

tool_args.label: Pride Express Lunch and Learn April 2022
tool_args.raw_text: April – Pride Express facilitated a lunch and learn utilizing games to educate employees of famous individuals within the LGBTQ+ community. They also informed participants of their upcoming events.

payload.description: Pride Express facilitated a lunch and learn utilizing games to educate employees of famous individuals within the LGBTQ+ community

tool_args.label: DDCR All-Agency ERG Membership Drive May 2022
tool_args.raw_text: May – DDCR launched an All-Agency ERG Membership Drive. Over seven hundred (700+) members from all agencies joined one or more of the 9 Employee Resource Groups.

payload.description: DDCR launched an All-Agency ERG Membership Drive. Over 700+ members from all agencies joined one or more of the 9 Employee Resource Groups

tool_args.label: MTA Veterans ERG Memorial Day Celebration
tool_args.raw_text: Veterans – Memorial Day Celebration - The MTA Veteran's Employee Resource Group (ERG) held a noontime observance on May 26 at 130 Livingston in Brooklyn. They also visited the WWII Memorial Wall that includes the names of MTA workers who paid the ultimate sacrifice during WWII.

payload.description: MTA Veteran's ERG held a noontime observance on May 26 at 130 Livingston in Brooklyn and visited the WWII Memorial Wall

tool_args.label: Cross Cultural Exchange Discussion May 2022
tool_args.raw_text: TransportAsian, Multicultural and Latinos & Friends - Hosted a Cross Cultural Exchange discussion to exchange distinct ideas, experiences and perspectives on culture, identify and more.

payload.description: TransportAsian, Multicultural and Latinos & Friends hosted a Cross Cultural Exchange discussion

tool_args.label: B.E.G.I.N. Juneteenth Celebration June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Black Employee Group for Inclusion and Networking (B.E.G.I.N.) – Hosted a celebration in honor of Juneteenth (June 19th). B.E.G.I.N. held a 2.5-mile walk in honor and celebration of the 'Opal Walk for Freedom' a walking campaign started by Ms. Lee Opal to make Juneteenth a national holiday. The women dressed in purple also participated in the African Burial Ground event.

payload.description: B.E.G.I.N. hosted a Juneteenth celebration including a 2.5-mile 'Opal Walk for Freedom' and participation in African Burial Ground event

tool_args.label: Pride Express Stonewall Anniversary Events June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Pride Express – In commemoration of the 53rd anniversary of the Stonewall Uprising Pride Express conducted a historical walking tour to the Stonewall National Monument. Also, a Lunch and Learn on LGBTQ+ history was held with a focus on Stonewall. The discussion centered on the LGBTQ+ movement, a look back on the events leading to the Stonewall riots, the uprising and the gains in civil and human rights.

payload.description: Pride Express conducted a historical walking tour to the Stonewall National Monument and held a Lunch and Learn on LGBTQ+ history for the 53rd anniversary of the Stonewall Uprising

tool_args.label: TransportAsian Dynamic Dialogues Roundtable
tool_args.raw_text: TransportAsian – Hosted a dynamic dialogues roundtable discussion with MTA senior executives of the Asian/Pacific Islander communities. They also presented 2 cultural performances.
